FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-18-2011 Continued To Jun-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PCN-09-293056 The James Adams Living Trust.

Appearances: Arthur Park for Thomas Lucas (Petitioner).

Mr. Park stated that Senior Associate Sheila Robello is handling these cases, that she has been out of the office for over a month, that all financial materials were sent to the Probate Accountant and that the accounting should have been a week ago. In addition, he stated that he has left messages with the Accountant, that he has not heard from him, that if necessary he will have to get the material to somebody else and hopefully he can have something in within two or three days. Status of filing of the First Account on both matters were continued to June 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. .

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (4224 26th Street, San Francisco, Ca 94131)
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Thomas Lucas (Trustee).

The sale was confirmed at $1,095,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). The request to waive bond is granted.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
